summary: rc.15 Phase 2 「CLI surface contraction」 release — 10 cleanup items (C1-C10) bundled into 6 sequential git commits. Contracts the public CLI surface from 7 commands × ~35 flags to 5 visible commands × ~20 flags. Kills legacy escape hatches (--force on install/uninstall/doctor/serve; --reapply on install) per rc.14-promised deprecation. Renames --plan→--dry-run (install+uninstall) and --apply-lint→--fix-knowledge (doctor, CLI-local only). Adds --rescan on doctor (composable single-pass: rescan→mutations→report). Prunes command tree: delete top-level fab hooks (helpers move to install/hooks-orchestrator.ts); fold fab scan → fab doctor --rescan (delete legacy createScanReport + walkFiles + buildRecommendations + getReadmeQuality + matchesIgnorePattern, keep runInitScan); strip fab config subCommands; hide fab plan-context-hint via citty meta.hidden:true; wire fab config visible as rc.16 placeholder. Dedupes auditMode/audit_mode schema dup in packages/shared. Rewrites ServeLockHeldError to drop --force suggestion and surface PID + kill cmd guidance. Drift-recovery path consolidates to `fab uninstall && fab install`.
approach: Six sequential commits, each = one task = one cohesive concern. Order: TASK-001 (install flags, biggest blast radius, sets drift-abort message baseline) → TASK-002 (uninstall flags, symmetric mirror, also deletes cleanEmpties option entirely) → TASK-003 (doctor+serve paired because shared ServeLockHeldError message rewrite + shared --force kill) → TASK-004 (command-tree batch: 5 edits sharing the snapshot file + index.ts router) → TASK-005 (schema dedupe, isolated to packages/shared) → TASK-006 (version bump + CHANGELOG, final). Sequential ordering chosen over [1,2,5]-parallel-then-3→4→6 to minimize merge conflicts on shared files (CHANGELOG.md, cli-surface.test.ts, snapshot file). Each task: tsc clean, lint clean, vitest passes individually. End of rc.15: Gemini code review + coverage report runs ONCE for the entire chain per memory feedback_review_batching.md.
estimated_time: 3-4 hours (TASK-001 ~45min, TASK-002 ~45min, TASK-003 ~50min, TASK-004 ~60min, TASK-005 ~15min, TASK-006 ~15min)

design_decisions.rationale: Convention match with existing src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts; commands/ directory becomes pure citty wrappers
design_decisions.tradeoff: Adds one file + 2 test import path updates + 1 install.ts import update

design_decisions.decision: --apply-lint → --fix-knowledge rename is CLI + doctor.ts local only
design_decisions.rationale: Minimize blast radius; server-side runDoctorApplyLint/DoctorApplyLintReport names are internal contract, not user-visible
design_decisions.tradeoff: Internal naming asymmetry between CLI (fixKnowledge) and server (applyLint); mitigated by alias-import at boundary

design_decisions.decision: cleanEmpties option DELETED entirely (not kept as internal toggle defaulting to true)
design_decisions.rationale: Pre-user clean-slate per memory feedback_clean_slate.md; zero callers outside CLI
design_decisions.tradeoff: Future rc.16+ callers needing cleanEmpties:false must add option back

design_decisions.decision: createScanReport + walkFiles + buildRecommendations + getReadmeQuality + matchesIgnorePattern DELETED with scan-edge-cases.test.ts
design_decisions.rationale: Pure clean-slate; runInitScan is the v2 replacement and the legacy v1 API has no production callers
design_decisions.tradeoff: Lose scan-edge-cases.test.ts coverage; runInitScan + scan-init.test.ts provide v2 coverage

design_decisions.decision: parseClientFilter (config.ts:56-73) DELETED as orphan after C6
design_decisions.rationale: Zero production callers post-C6; rc.16 mcp-config sub-panel can re-add if needed
design_decisions.tradeoff: config-install.test.ts client-aliases describe block also deleted; helper rewrite cost in rc.16

design_decisions.decision: fab config VISIBLE in --help with t('cli.config.placeholder') message
design_decisions.rationale: Signals rc.16 ETA to users discovering the surface; consistent with the three-entry model from feedback_cli_design.md
design_decisions.tradeoff: Half-baked surface advertised; mitigated by clear placeholder wording 'Config panel coming in rc.16'

design_decisions.decision: --rescan runs BEFORE doctor report; composable with --fix and --fix-knowledge
design_decisions.rationale: Single-pass user experience (rescan → mutations → report); fresh state feeds both mutations and report
design_decisions.tradeoff: Slightly longer doctor invocation when --rescan flag set; negligible

design_decisions.rationale: feedback_cli_design.md locks this in; drift-recovery becomes `fab uninstall && fab install` (already in drift-abort message)
design_decisions.tradeoff: Loss of in-place re-application; mitigated by drift-abort guidance already pointing users to uninstall+install

design_decisions.rationale: Without --force, events.jsonl-as-directory recovery converges to `fab uninstall && fab install`; the drift-abort message already documents this path
design_decisions.tradeoff: Loss of explicit corruption-recovery test coverage; user manual recovery still works

design_decisions.decision: ServeLockHeldError message uses verbose option with PID + kill cmd
design_decisions.rationale: Max user guidance; copy-paste kill cmd reduces friction when discovering blocking serve instance
design_decisions.tradeoff: Longer error message; acceptable for unambiguous user action

design_decisions.decision: cli-surface.test.ts public command set stays at 5 (rotate scan→config)
design_decisions.rationale: Maintains the drift-gate's contract count; visible config replaces visible scan
design_decisions.tradeoff: Drift gate doesn't track hidden plan-context-hint; intentional (hidden ≠ public surface)

design_decisions.decision: Schema dedupe via direct removal (no zod preprocess shim)
design_decisions.rationale: Pre-user clean-slate; non-strict schema silently drops dropped key at parse time so wild camelCase configs don't error
design_decisions.tradeoff: External configs with camelCase auditMode silently lose the setting; acceptable for zero-user state

completeness.notes: All 10 cleanup items C1-C10 mapped to TASK-001..TASK-005; version bump in TASK-006. Each architectural clarification (11 items in task brief) has explicit handling in the corresponding task's files[]/implementation[]/rationale block.

granularity.notes: Tasks sized 15-60 min each; TASK-004 is the largest (~60min) at 5 batched command-tree edits sharing the snapshot file. Splitting TASK-004 would force inter-commit snapshot regen churn.

dependencies.notes: No circular deps. TASK-003 depends on [TASK-001, TASK-002] (merge_fork) because doctor.ts/serve-lock.ts message coordination depends on install/uninstall i18n key shapes being settled. TASK-004 depends on TASK-003 because doctor's --rescan handler imports runInitScan path that scan.ts is restructured around. TASK-005 independent. TASK-006 depends on all five (merge_fork) for CHANGELOG completeness.

convergence_criteria.notes: Every task has 8-15 quantified criteria (grep-verifiable counts, exact file lists, exit-code gates, snapshot shape assertions). No vague language like 'works correctly'.

implementation_steps.notes: Each task has 12-20 implementation steps; smallest (TASK-005) has 9 steps. All actionable with explicit file paths + line ranges.

constraint_compliance.notes: Follows memory feedback_clean_slate.md (pure deletions for cleanEmpties, parseClientFilter, createScanReport legacy block, auditMode dup). Follows feedback_review_batching.md (TASK-006 commit message + implementation step explicitly defers Gemini review to one batch at end). Follows feedback_cli_design.md three-entry model. Follows project_v2_rc_continuation.md (continues rc chain → v2.0.0-rc.15).
